name: io.github.michaelhologram/clutter-mcp
title: Clutter
description: Generate synthetic companies, documents & data via the Clutter API (e.g. to fill SharePoint).

environmentVariables.name: CLUTTER_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key for the Clutter API (mint one in the web app → Settings).

environmentVariables.name: CLUTTER_API_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL for the Clutter API.
